description: Blog generation from VOC pain points. Validates 1500-2500 words, 6+ citations, 15+ data points, FAQ section, comparison table, GEO score >= 80.

pain_points_summary.data_point: 68% of negative reviews mention weight capacity issues
pain_points_summary.design_solution: 450lb tested capacity with reinforced steel frame

pain_points_summary.data_point: 42% of negative reviews cite bulky folding and storage
pain_points_summary.design_solution: One-fold mechanism, fits in trunk corner

validation_criteria: Blog is 1500-2500 words
Contains 6+ citations from authority sources
Contains 15+ quantitative data points
FAQ section present with 5+ Q&A pairs
Comparison table present with 3+ competitors
GEO score >= 80
All HARD FAIL rules (Categories A-D) passed
Pain point data from VOC ('68%', '450lb') appears in content
No keyword stuffing (category keyword max 3x per 500 words)

description: Amazon listing optimization. Validates title < 200 chars with numeric spec, 5 bullets with CAPS benefit + data, no keyword stuffing, GEO score >= 80.

pain_points_summary.data_point: 34% of negative reviews cite battery life
22% of negative reviews about fit issues
pain_points_summary.design_solution: 3 ear tip sizes + wing tips for secure fit

pain_points_summary.data_point: 18% of negative reviews cite weak ANC

validation_criteria: Title is < 200 characters
Title contains numeric spec (e.g., '48-Hour', '35dB')
5 bullet points present
Each bullet starts with CAPS benefit keyword followed by data point
No keyword stuffing (category keyword max 3x per 500 words)
GEO score >= 80
All HARD FAIL rules passed
Pain point data from VOC ('34%', '48-hour') appears in listing

description: Product description with expert citations. Validates BIFMA/UL authority citations, all specs have units, named competitor comparison, 10+ data points, GEO score >= 80.
validation_criteria: BIFMA and/or UL authority citations present
All technical specs include units (lbs, inches, watts, etc.)
Named competitor comparison included (FlexiSpot, Uplift, or IKEA)
10+ quantitative data points in description
GEO score >= 80
All HARD FAIL rules passed
Pain point data from VOC ('31%', 'dual-motor') appears in content

description: Rules engine catches deliberate violations in pre-written bad content. Validates detection of: C1 (keyword stuffing), C2 (vague qualifier), C4 (generic opener), A1 (no citations), D1 (no FAQ). Score < 40.

input.content_to_validate: In today's fast-paced world, finding the best portable blender is important. A portable blender is a great portable blender for anyone who needs a portable blender. This amazing portable blender is truly the best portable blender on the market. The portable blender features very good blending power and really nice design. It is quite durable and somewhat affordable. Many people love this top-quality portable blender because it is an incredible portable blender that blends well.

validation_criteria: C1 violation detected: keyword stuffing ('portable blender' appears > 3x per 500 words)
C2 violation detected: vague qualifiers ('very good', 'really nice', 'quite', 'somewhat')
C4 violation detected: generic opener ('In today's fast-paced world')
A1 violation detected: no citations or authority sources
D1 violation detected: no FAQ section
GEO score < 40
Rules engine does not crash on bad content

test_name: Multi-Format Output from Single VOC Report
description: Full content suite for portable blender: blog + Amazon listing + product description. Validates all three use same VOC data, each format passes GEO rules, pain point #1 addressed in all outputs, cross-format duplication < 20%.

pain_points_summary.issue: Blade not strong enough for ice
pain_points_summary.data_point: 38% of negative reviews cite ice-crushing failure
pain_points_summary.design_solution: 6-blade stainless steel system crushes 10 ice cubes in 15 seconds

pain_points_summary.issue: Battery too low for multiple uses
pain_points_summary.data_point: 29% of negative reviews cite battery life
21% of negative reviews mention cleaning difficulty
pain_points_summary.design_solution: Self-cleaning mode: add water + soap, press button

validation_criteria: 3 distinct content formats generated
All three use same VOC data (ice-crushing, battery, cleaning)
Each format passes GEO rules with score >= 80
Pain point #1 (ice-crushing, '38%') addressed in all three outputs
Cross-format text duplication < 20% (measured by n-gram overlap)
Blog has comparison table and FAQ
Amazon listing has 5 CAPS bullets
Product description has authority citations

description: Detects stale citations (2022-2023) in wireless charger content. Validates warnings on citations older than 18 months, replacement sources suggested.

input.content_to_validate: According to a 2022 study by Consumer Reports, wireless chargers have improved significantly. TechRadar's March 2023 review found that Qi2 chargers deliver up to 15W. A 2021 report by iFixit noted that wireless charging coils are standardized. PCMag's 2023 buyer guide recommends MagSafe-compatible chargers for iPhone users.

validation_criteria: Detects at least 3 stale citations (older than 18 months from 2026-03-05)
Consumer Reports 2022 flagged as stale
iFixit 2021 flagged as stale
TechRadar March 2023 flagged as stale
Replacement/updated sources suggested for each stale citation
Suggestions include sources from 2025-2026 timeframe
